files.data:
# Course illustrations

Six original diagrams covering place value, estimation, addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

All lesson images and the course cover are stored locally under `assets/images/` for offline compilation and reading. The lesson illustrations were created specifically for this sample repository and do not depend on remote image hosts.

Research and further-reading links remain in the lesson text.

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1600" height="900" viewBox="0 0 1600 900">
  <rect width="1600" height="900" fill="#8a7658"/>
  <path d="M0 680 C300 520 560 800 900 620 S1320 440 1600 600 V900 H0Z" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".16"/>
  <circle cx="1280" cy="200" r="138" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".24"/>
  <text x="110" y="325" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="78">Basic Arithmetic</text>
  <text x="110" y="420" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="72">Number Sense and Operations</text>
  <text x="115" y="505" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="30" opacity=".84">An MCF 1.0 course</text>
</svg>

id: addition-and-subtraction
title: "Addition and Subtraction"
description: "A focused unit in Basic Arithmetic: Number Sense and Operations."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-addition-as-combining.mcf
  - lessons/02-subtraction-as-difference.mcf

id: multiplication-and-division
title: "Multiplication and Division"
description: "A focused unit in Basic Arithmetic: Number Sense and Operations."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-multiplication-as-equal-groups.mcf
  - lessons/02-division-as-sharing.mcf

id: numbers-and-place-value
title: "Numbers and Place Value"
description: "A focused unit in Basic Arithmetic: Number Sense and Operations."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-reading-numbers.mcf
  - lessons/02-estimating-first.mcf

mcf: "1.0"
id: basic-arithmetic
title: "Basic Arithmetic: Number Sense and Operations"
language: en
description: "A friendly foundation in place value, addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and everyday problem solving."
authors:
  - "Theoria Learning Studio"
license: CC-BY-4.0
version: "1.0.0"
cover: assets/images/cover.svg
chapters:
  - source: chapters/numbers-and-place-value
  - source: chapters/addition-and-subtraction
  - source: chapters/multiplication-and-division
